## Pre-migration checklist (team lead)

- [ ] I have reviewed the [migration runbook](../../docs/runbooks/migration-playbook.md)
- [ ] Secrets audit completed for all listed repos
- [ ] All team members have active EMU accounts with SSO working
- [ ] External collaborators identified and reported to TPM
